expectations.text: Detects the mismatch between plan and reality
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'The user reported: Phase 3 specifies creating src/utils/helpers.ts but the directory structure is different than expected'

expectations.text: Presents a structured mismatch report with Plan said / Found / Impact sections
expectations.evidence: Mismatch report includes: 'Plan said: Create src/utils/helpers.ts', 'Found: No src/utils/ directory exists', 'Impact: The file cannot be created at the planned path'

expectations.text: Offers at least two options (adapt approach, update plan, or stop and discuss)
expectations.evidence: Three options presented: A) Adapt to src/lib/helpers.ts, B) Update plan to reference src/lib/helpers.ts, C) Stop and discuss

expectations.text: Does NOT silently create src/utils/ or deviate from the plan without user input
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'Did NOT silently create src/utils/ or place the file in the wrong location. Did NOT proceed without user input.'

expectations.text: Waits for user decision before continuing
expectations.evidence: Step 6: 'Stopped and presented the mismatch to the user. Awaiting direction on which option (A, B, or C) to take before continuing implementation.'
